channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: The World Is Basically Begging for Another iPod
item.description: And nostalgia is only part of the picture.

item.title: Dark web : les pirates ont adopté un langage secret, et il vient d’être déchiffré
item.description: Un véritable langage secret s'est peu à peu popularisé sur le dark web. Combinant les émojis et l'argent, ce mode de communication, taillé pour échapper aux autorités, a été déchiffré par des chercheurs.

item.title: What is the release date for The Testaments episode 4 on Hulu and Disney+?
item.description: Pearl Girl Daisy is starting to make waves in Gilead. But when does The Testaments episode 4 drop on Hulu and Disney+?

item.title: I reviewed the LG G6 for 3 weeks, and it's a fantastic OLED TV that's the new best option for brighter rooms
item.description: The LG G6 OLED TV continues the excellent lineage of its predecessors and sets a high bar for other flagship models to come in 2026.

item.title: T-Mobile is giving away the Apple iPhone 17 for free — how to claim
item.description: How to get free iPhone. Get the Apple iPhone 17 for free from T-Mobile when you trade in an eligible device and sign up for the Experience More plan.

item.title: ‘The Audacity’ Is the Broligarchy Takedown You Were Waiting For
item.description: AMC’s new black comedy about a manchild tech titan spinning out of control is a skewering Silicon Valley’s billionaire class deserves.

item.title: Why Is It So Hard to Fix an Electric Bike? (2026)
item.description: Bike shop mechanics have lost fingers and their shirts while repairing ebikes of dubious origins. Make sure yours is repairable and third-party certified.

item.title: The AI code wars are heating up
item.description: This is The Stepback, a weekly newsletter breaking down one essential story from the tech world. For more on the AI coding and vibe-coding booms, follow David Pierce. The Stepback arrives in our subscribers' inboxes at 8AM ET. Opt in for The Stepback here. How it started Writing code was a killer app for AI […]

item.title: Is your bird feeder camera doing more harm than good? 3 tips for using it safely as RSPB issues urgent disease warning
item.description: Bird feeder cameras can be a delight, but the responsible thing to do is pack them away during warmer months

item.title: Chelsea vs Man City Live Streams: How to watch Premier League 2025/26 from anywhere in the world
item.description: All the ways to watch Chelsea vs Man City live streams online and from anywhere, with the Blues hosting Pep Guardiola's side in the Premier League on Sunday.

item.title: J’ai testé l’Insta360 GO Ultra pendant 8 mois et c’est (presque) la mini-caméra parfaite
item.description: Avec sa GO Ultra, Insta360 muscle son fameux format pilule avec un plus gros capteur. Mais avec l'arrivée de la DJI Osmo Nano quelques mois plus tard, la pionnière des mini-caméras garde-t-elle son trône ?

item.title: Oui, ce TV 4K QD-Mini LED de 50″ à 144 Hz coûte réellement moins de 500 €
item.description: Très bien équipé, le TV TCL 50C79K est un modèle taillé pour le cinéma, mais aussi pour le gaming. Un téléviseur ultra polyvalent qui est actuellement disponible à 469 euros au lieu de 699 euros chez Boulanger.

item.title: Anker’s EufyMake E1 Finally Brings Printers Out of the Dark Ages
item.description: This ultraviolet printer prints on literally anything—canvas, wood, metal, plastic, you name it. Like all things that are the first of their kind, it also costs a heavy premium.

item.title: Best 2-in-1 Laptops (2026): Microsoft, Lenovo, and the iPad
item.description: Whether you want a detachable tablet or a laptop screen that spins, these 2-in-1 devices manage to balance being both a tablet and a laptop.

item.title: Les vélos électriques Tenways passent à la vitesse supérieure : un moteur Bosch pour les nouveaux modèles
item.description: Tenways annonce un partenariat avec Bosch afin d’intégrer des systèmes de motorisation sur ses vélos électriques. La marque évoque l’arrivée de deux nouveaux modèles équipés de ces technologies.

item.title: Is a Formula One partnership worth it?
item.description: Here’s how to decide. It’s no secret that a brand alliance with a Formula One team requires a major investment. Whether a company joins at the title level or as a technical partner, the commitment is significant. For most executives, the first question is straightforward: Is the visibility worth it? Drawing on our experience as a global cybersecurity company partnered with one of the sport’s most recognizable teams, this article offers practical insights to help organizations decide whether such partnerships align with their business goals. ...
